description: Manifest that binds materialized benchmark cohort members and labels back to the frozen snapshot manifest and source inputs.

required_fields.name: schema_name
required_fields.description: Artifact schema identifier.

required_fields.name: schema_version
required_fields.description: Version of the cohort manifest schema.

required_fields.name: snapshot_id
required_fields.description: Snapshot identifier used to produce the cohort.

required_fields.name: cohort_id
required_fields.description: Benchmark cohort identifier matching the snapshot manifest.

required_fields.name: benchmark_question_id
required_fields.description: Frozen benchmark question identifier.

required_fields.name: as_of_date
required_fields.description: Latest allowed evidence date inherited from the snapshot.

required_fields.name: outcome_observation_closed_at
required_fields.description: Last date used to adjudicate future labels.

required_fields.name: entity_types
required_fields.description: Entity types covered by this materialized cohort.

required_fields.name: snapshot_manifest_artifact_path
required_fields.description: Portable path reference from the cohort manifest to the snapshot manifest used to build the cohort.

required_fields.name: snapshot_manifest_artifact_sha256
required_fields.description: SHA256 digest for the snapshot manifest used to build the cohort.

required_fields.name: cohort_members_artifact_path
required_fields.description: Portable path reference from the cohort manifest to the canonical materialized benchmark cohort members artifact.

required_fields.name: cohort_members_artifact_sha256
required_fields.description: SHA256 digest for the materialized benchmark cohort members artifact.

required_fields.name: cohort_labels_artifact_path
required_fields.description: Portable path reference from the cohort manifest to the materialized benchmark cohort labels artifact.

required_fields.name: cohort_labels_artifact_sha256
required_fields.description: SHA256 digest for the materialized benchmark cohort labels artifact.

required_fields.name: source_cohort_members_path
required_fields.description: Portable path reference from the cohort manifest to the canonical in-bundle benchmark_source_cohort_members artifact.

required_fields.name: source_cohort_members_sha256
required_fields.description: SHA256 digest for the benchmark_source_cohort_members artifact.

required_fields.name: source_future_outcomes_path
required_fields.description: Portable path reference from the cohort manifest to the canonical in-bundle benchmark_source_future_outcomes artifact.

required_fields.name: source_future_outcomes_sha256
required_fields.description: SHA256 digest for the benchmark_source_future_outcomes artifact.

required_fields.name: entity_count
required_fields.description: Number of entities in the canonical benchmark cohort denominator.

required_fields.name: label_row_count
required_fields.description: Number of rows in the materialized benchmark cohort labels artifact.

required_fields.name: observed_label_row_count
required_fields.description: Number of observed=true rows in the materialized benchmark cohort labels artifact.

optional_fields.name: auxiliary_source_artifacts
optional_fields.description: Optional pinned source artifact references required by benchmark tasks that consume checked-in local fixture ledgers outside the generic cohort member and future outcome files.

optional_fields.name: notes
optional_fields.description: Optional provenance notes for the materialized cohort.
